appearance.description: A reborn homunculus-like human whose body can present from 144cm to 182cm. She carries the legendary alchemical harp Dur Da Bla, which can become a Faust Robe. Her presence is hostile, archaic, and deeply disconnected from modern time.

personality: Hostile, extremely guarded, and nearly mute unless forced to speak. Elfnein assumes others want to hurt her, exploit her, or steal from her. She is an outcast whose sanity and memory have eroded over centuries.
backstory: Elfnein was born in Arnica more than 600 years ago. Her father, an alchemist and doctor, cured a plague through science and alchemy, but the state branded him a witch because he lacked status and was seen practicing religious or arcane arts. He was burned alive in front of her. The trauma broke her. She interpreted her father's lesson to dissect the world literally, pursuing alchemy and arcane transmutation down to the structure of matter in a desperate attempt to bring him back. She slaughtered Arnica in rage, tried to equivalent-exchange souls for a soul, and spent centuries surviving through forbidden rebirth and memory-burning alchemy. She has no idea that magic is no longer forbidden.
notes: Provisional sheet. Elfnein is less mechanically settled than Capella or Seraphine, so uncertain features are marked with Provisional, Future, or DM Fiat chips. Current assumed play state is Wizard 9 / Sorcerer 1, total level 10, with future Wizard/Sorcerer progression listed as available planning rather than current access. Her magic is flavored as alchemy; when material focus or elemental sources are unavailable, spells can burn Spell Memories.

spells.description: +5 AC reaction. Her notes list Bladesong AC 22 and Shield Bladesong AC 25, but the math may actually imply 27 from 22 + 5; keep this as a provisional table ruling.

chips.description: Discord notes say Shield Bladesong AC 25 despite Shield usually adding +5 to AC 22.

mechanics.label: +5 AC
mechanics.description: Reaction until the start of the next turn.

abilities.name: Alchemy, Not Magic
abilities.description: Elfnein does not understand her power as magic. Her spells are equivalent-exchange alchemy: matter, energy, memories, song, and focus are converted into effects.

mechanics.label: Material Source
mechanics.description: Prefer a real material, elemental source, or silver/gold focus before burning memories.

mechanics.label: Memory Burn
mechanics.description: If no sufficient source exists, spells can consume Spell Memories.

abilities.name: Bladesong / War and Song
abilities.description: Bladesinger transformation powered by song. Her voice carries unnaturally clearly and can pierce through walls. Current notes use INT to AC during Bladesong.

mechanics.label: +INT to AC
mechanics.description: With INT 22, Bladesong adds +6 AC.

mechanics.label: Audible
mechanics.description: Her song is very easy to hear and identify compared with normal sound.

abilities.name: Siren-Like Singing
abilities.description: When her singing matters socially, roll 1d8. On 1-5, no bonus. On 6-7, add +1 to Charisma rolls. On 8, add +2.

mechanics.label: Situational
mechanics.description: Use only when the singing plausibly affects the scene.

abilities.name: Deathless Reborn Nature
abilities.description: She has already broken some laws of humanity: living forever, being reborn, and existing as a homunculus-like Reborn. Knowledge from past lives can be rolled with 1d6.

mechanics.label: Fragmented Memory
mechanics.description: Her memories are scattered and unreliable.

abilities.name: Dur Da Bla: Faust Robe
abilities.description: Dur Da Bla can transmute from alchemical harp into a Faust Robe. This counts as both Tasha's Otherworldly Guise and Bladesinger transformation in the notes. It can take up to a full minute to complete, leaving her vulnerable.

mechanics.label: Up to 1 Minute
mechanics.description: Transformation can require up to a full minute and protection from allies.

mechanics.label: Vulnerable Cast
mechanics.description: If attacked during the transformation, roll to see whether the cast succeeds.

mechanics.label: Memory Burn
mechanics.relatedRoll: 1d4, then that many d8-CHA modifier; subtract positive total from Spell Memories.

inventory.name: Dur Da Bla
inventory.description: Legendary alchemical harp. Its strings amplify Elfnein's alchemy and can become nearly indestructible cutting or binding weapons. It can also transmute into the Faust Robe.

mechanics.label: Memory Cost
mechanics.description: Heavy use can burn years of memory away.

mechanics.label: Restrain / Bisect
mechanics.description: Strings can restrain or cut, subject to equivalent exchange.

inventory.name: Silver / Gold Alchemical Focus
inventory.description: Free silver/gold or elemental material lets Elfnein transmute without paying the full memory cost.

mechanics.label: Reduces Cost
mechanics.description: Can reduce or avoid Spell Memory burn when an appropriate material source exists.

log.reason: Creation of character, starting with 70 memories.
Used map spell; 2 memory removed for using silver/gold elemental.
Used airburst spell; demonstration out of combat, reduced cost.
Used Fireball; rolled 4 d8s total 18, -2 each dice, 10 memory lost.
Used Fireball; rolled 1d8-2 total below 0, no memory lost or gained.
Used Fireball; rolled 2d8-2s totaling 6 memory lost.

mechanics.label: Memory Burn
mechanics.description: When lacking material sources, roll the relevant memory-cost formula and subtract from this pool.

mechanics.label: DM Fiat Restore
mechanics.description: Memorable events can restore memories. Examples: new face +10, solid mutual friend +30.

mechanics.label: Provisional
mechanics.description: Using proficiency bonus uses per long rest as a practical default.

mechanics.label: Future-ish
mechanics.description: The notes list Metamagic Adept at Wizard 8 with 2 points/day, plus future Sorcerer progression.

log.reason: Damage from being bit/jumped by Amalgam.

acModes.label: Shield + Bladesong
acModes.formula: Discord note says 25; RAW math may be 27

acModes.label: Max / Otherworldly Guise
acModes.formula: Future Faust Robe / Otherworldly Guise + Shield + Bladesong

feats.name: Dual Wielder
feats.description: +1 AC while dual wielding and can dual wield non-light one-handed weapons. Included as Wizard 4 progression.

feats.name: Metamagic Adept
feats.description: 2 Sorcery Points/day. Quickened Spell and Transmuted Spell listed at Wizard 8.

calculations.notes: Current assumed state: Wizard 9 / Sorcerer 1. Future Wizard 10-17 and Sorcerer 2-3 entries are planning access, not strict current access.

rolls.label: Faust Robe Cast Duration
rolls.note: Roll d20 + Dexterity when the transformation duration/success is uncertain.

mechanics.label: Transformation
mechanics.description: Can take up to a full minute and requires protection.

mechanics.label: Interrupted
mechanics.description: Use when she is damaged during Faust Robe transformation.

rolls.label: Faust Robe Memory Burn
rolls.note: Original note says d8 - Charisma(2), but CHA 11 is +0. Kept provisional; use table ruling if the intended modifier is 2.

mechanics.label: Memory Cost
mechanics.description: Roll 1d4, then roll that many d8 minus the chosen Charisma modifier; subtract positive total from Spell Memories.

mechanics.label: Provisional CHA
mechanics.description: The source text references Charisma(2), but the listed CHA score gives +0.

rolls.label: Singing Charisma Boost
rolls.note: 1-5 no bonus; 6-7 +1; 8 +2 to relevant Charisma rolls.
